title: Cinta sama dengan Cindolo Na Tape

overview: Timi falls in love with We Cinde, a new student in his class. Their closeness makes Ian, Timi's friend since junior high, growl because Timi becomes rarely gathering with his best friend. Ian choose to hang out with two crooks at school.
